title: Fixed "subscription_period" docstring
body:
## Description
Fixed method docstring for "subscription_period"

Python version: 3.10

OS: macOS Sonoma 14.7

## Checklist:
- Just minor change of param docstring

step_plan.summary: Minor docstring corrections: update the subscription_period parameter description in the ChatBoostSourcePremium and ChatBoost constructors in telebot/types.py to ensure documentation and generated translations are accurate and consistent.

steps.reason: The docstring for the subscription_period parameter in ChatBoostSourcePremium contains an incorrect or unclear description. Correcting it in the class/constructor docstring ensures the authoritative source for generated documentation is accurate and consistent with the API semantics and Sphinx-style param annotations used across the project.
steps.side_effects: Documentation-only change; no runtime behavior changes. Generated docs (HTML) will reflect the corrected text once docs are regenerated. If the project includes tests that assert on docstrings, those tests may need updating. Translation / localization files (docs/source/locales/*/types.po) may become out-of-sync and should be regenerated or updated to reflect the changed English source string.

steps.reason: If ChatBoost also documents subscription_period (or references the same concept), make the corresponding correction there so all related types use a consistent, correct description. This prevents divergence between related type docstrings and avoids confusing generated docs or downstream consumers that read both class docs.
steps.side_effects: Documentation-only change; no runtime behavior changes. Keeps docs consistent across related types. As above, documentation generation and translation files may need regeneration or manual update; tests that check docstrings will need review.
